economic_notes: Naegha Zhia Inc. (100% subsidiary), Ehdah Cho Store (100% subsidiary), Hay River Dene Reserve Limited Partnership (100% limited partner), Evergreen Forestry Limited Partnership (50% interest - forest fire fighting and forestry services near Hay River NT). Agricultural Benefits Settlement Agreement for $28,343,937 held in trust by Peace Hills Trust Company.
notes: Non-consolidated financial statements for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 (audit report dated June 8, 2022). Revenue includes unexpended fund movements which are unusual presentation items. OSR is negative because unexpended funds closing adjustment reduces total revenue below government transfers. Two 100% subsidiaries (Naegha Zhia Inc. and Ehdah Cho Store) and one limited partnership (Hay River Dene Reserve LP) are not consolidated. Evergreen Forestry LP (50% interest) recorded at cost of $93,500 rather than equity method. Agricultural Benefits Settlement of $28,343,937 held in external trust and excluded from financial statements per Note 14. Long-term debt of $2,257,745 is an interest-free TLE loan offset by deferred costs. Contributions repayable of $1,162,852 arose in 2021 (new liability). Province code NT (Northwest Territories).
